7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Dockerfile"}]
8:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"FROM python:3.12-slim\n\nWORKDIR /app\n\n# Install mnemosyne from PyPI\nRUN pip install --no-cache-dir \"mnemosyne-memory[mcp]\"\n\n# Install SQLite with FTS5\nRUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y sqlite3 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*\n\n# Create data directory\nRUN mkdir -p /data\n\nEXPOSE 8080\n\nENV MNEMOSYNE_DATA_DIR=/data\n# MCP_TOKEN required when binding 0.0.0.0; set via docker-compose environment\nENV MNEMOSYNE_MCP_TOKEN=\n\n# MCP server over SSE transport\nCMD [\"python\", \"-m\", \"mnemosyne.mcp_server\", \"--transport\", \"sse\", \"--host\", \"0.0.0.0\", \"--port\", \"8080\"]\n","language":"dockerfile"}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"docker-compose.yml"}]
a:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"version: \"3.8\"\n\nservices:\nmnemosyne:\n  build: .\n  ports:\n    - \"8080:8080\"\n  volumes:\n    - mnemosyne-data:/data\n  environment:\n    - MNEMOSYNE_DATA_DIR=/data\n    - MNEMOSYNE_MCP_TOKEN=$MCP_TOKEN\n  restart: unless-stopped\n  healthcheck:\n    test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"-s\", \"http://localhost:8080/sse\"]\n    interval: 30s\n    timeout: 10s\n    retries: 3\n    start_period: 10s\n\nvolumes:\nmnemosyne-data:\n","language":"yaml"}]
b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Run"}]
c:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"docker-compose up -d\n","language":"bash"}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"SSE Endpoint Check"}]
e:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"curl -s http://localhost:8080/sse\n","language":"bash"}]
f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Backup Volume"}]
10:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"# Create backup\ndocker run --rm -v mnemosyne-data:/data -v $(pwd):/backup alpine tar czf /backup/mnemosyne-backup.tar.gz -C /data .\n\n# Restore\ndocker run --rm -v mnemosyne-data:/data -v $(pwd):/backup alpine tar xzf /backup/mnemosyne-backup.tar.gz -C /data\n","language":"bash"}]
11:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L19",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Bind Mount vs Named Volume"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Use named volumes (as shown above) for production. Bind mounts to host directories work for development but can cause permission issues."}]}]]}]]}]}]
